title: Add private on-device voice feedback
summary: The macOS approval app now lets reviewers dictate rejection feedback inline. EVE checks the current locale for an on-device recognizer before requesting access, asks for Speech and microphone permissions only after the mic control is invoked, requires on-device recognition for every request, streams partial text without duplicating or replacing pre-existing feedback, and exposes clear recording, finishing, denied, unavailable, and failure states.
userVisibleChange: Reviewers can tap “Dictate feedback” while rejecting a Plan, speak their response, and see it transcribed directly into the existing feedback field. Audio recognition is constrained to the Mac and never silently falls back to network transcription.

risks.title: On-device availability depends on the installed Dictation language
risks.mitigation: EVE checks supportsOnDeviceRecognition before permissions and shows an actionable System Settings message instead of using network recognition.

timeline.title: Locked voice-feedback Plan revision 1
timeline.summary: Scoped on-device dictation to inline Plan rejection feedback with explicit privacy and state requirements.

timeline.title: Implemented private transcription and inline controls
timeline.summary: Added the Speech/AVAudioEngine service, session-safe permissions, feedback composition, accessibility labels, privacy strings, and signed audio-input entitlement.

timeline.title: Validated package, Xcode, signing, and device capability
timeline.summary: Swift and Xcode tests passed; Debug and Release built; the signed app contains both usage descriptions and audio-input entitlement; this Mac reports en_TR on-device recognition available.

timeline.title: Completed standards and spec reviews
timeline.summary: Review-driven changes added permission/cancellation test seams, centralized teardown and presentation state, and moved voice tests into a focused suite. Final re-review found no findings.

decisions.title: Require on-device recognition without fallback
decisions.rationale: SFSpeechRecognitionRequest.requiresOnDeviceRecognition is always enabled, and EVE refuses to start when the current locale does not report supportsOnDeviceRecognition.

decisions.title: Request permissions only on microphone invocation
decisions.rationale: Speech and microphone are sensitive capabilities; EVE delays both system prompts until the reviewer explicitly chooses Dictate feedback.

decisions.title: Preserve a frozen typed prefix during partial results
decisions.rationale: Apple emits replacement partial hypotheses. Composing each hypothesis against the pre-dictation text avoids duplicated words and preserves feedback already typed.

decisions.title: Use session IDs across asynchronous permission and recognition callbacks
decisions.rationale: Late permission responses or cancellation errors from an older attempt must not start or corrupt a newer recording.

validation.output: 16 tests passed across PlanModelsTests and VoiceFeedbackTranscriberTests.
Debug app/test build succeeded; all 16 tests passed.

validation.command: Inspect Release Info.plist and codesign entitlements
validation.output: NSMicrophoneUsageDescription and NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription are present; signed app contains com.apple.security.device.audio-input=true.
Current Mac reports locale=en_TR, supportsOnDeviceRecognition=true, isAvailable=true.
